zh.lifeSummary: Gilbert Curwen II of Workington是Gilbert de Curwen的兒子，於大約1277年出生在英國波藍德。他於大約1295年與Eda Harrington結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1308年被列為sheriff of cumberland。他去世於1330年12月31日之前在英國維斯特莫藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gilbert Curwen II of Workington是Gilbert de Curwen的儿子，于大约1277年出生在英国波藍德。他于大约1295年与Eda Harrington结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1308年被列为sheriff of cumberland。他去世于1330年12月31日之前在英国維斯特莫藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Curwen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place called Culewen (now Colvend) in Kirkcudbrightshire. The family was early established in Lancashire, where it was often pronounced without the -w-; see Corrin and Currin .

variants.name: Corrin
meanings: Irish and Manx: shortened form of Mac Torin, from Gaelic mac ‘son (of)’ + Old Norse Thórfinnr (from Thórr, the name of the Scandinavian thunder god, + the ethnic designation Finnr). Compare Turpin . This name has occasionally been confused with Corin .

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Gilbert Curwen II of Workington was born about 1277, in Cumberland, England as the son of Gilbert de Curwen. He married Eda Harrington about 1295. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. In 1308, at the age of 32, his occupation is listed as sheriff of cumberland. He died before 31 December 1330, in Westmorland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Gilbert Curwen II of Workington est né environ 1277, à Cumberland, Angleterre, fils de Gilbert de Curwen. Il a épousé Eda Harrington environ 1295. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. En 1308, à l’âge de 32 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of cumberland. Il est décédé avant 31 décembre 1330, à Westmorland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Gilbert Curwen II of Workington wurde um 1277 in Cumberland, England, als Sohn von Gilbert de Curwen geboren. Er hat um 1295 Eda Harrington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1308, als er 32 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of cumberland aufgeführt. Er starb vor 31. Dezember 1330 in Westmorland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Gilbert Curwen II of Workington è nato il circa 1277 nel Cumberland, England come figlio di Gilbert de Curwen. Lui sposato Eda Harrington circa 1295. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1308, all'età di 32 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of cumberland. Morì prima del 31 dicembre 1330, nel Westmorland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Curwen II of Workingtonは約1277年にイギリスクウンバーランドでGilbert de Curwenの息子として生まれた。約1295年にEda Harringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1308年，32歳の時，職業はsheriff of cumberlandと記録されている。彼は1330年12月31日以前にイギリスウエストモーランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Curwen II of Workington(은)는 대략 1277년 영국 c벌랜드에서 Gilbert de Curwen의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1295년 Eda Harrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1308년, 32세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of cumberland이었다. 그는 1330년 12월 31일 이전 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1277–before 31 December 1330: ойролцоогоор 1277 он–1330 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 31–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Gilbert Curwen II of Workington nasceu aproximadamente 1277, em Cumberland, Inglaterra filho de Gilbert de Curwen. Ele casou-se com Eda Harrington aproximadamente 1295. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1308, com 32 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of cumberland. Ele faleceu antes 31 de dezembro de 1330, em Westmorland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Gilbert Curwen II of Workington родился около 1277 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия. Его отца звали Gilbert de Curwen. Он женился на женщине по имени Eda Harrington около 1295 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1308 году, в возрасте 32 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of cumberland. Он умер перед 31 декабрь 1330 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия.

sm.about 1277–before 31 December 1330: e tusa o le 1277–a'e le'I oo le 31 Tesema 1330

es.lifeSummary: Gilbert Curwen II of Workington nació aproximadamente 1277, en Cumberland, Inglaterra como hijo de Gilbert de Curwen. Se casó con Eda Harrington aproximadamente 1295. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1308, a la edad de 32 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of cumberland. Murió antes de 31 de diciembre de 1330, en Westmorland, Inglaterra.
